sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61247" key="kwlotome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωλο-τομέω</orth>, prop. <sense id="n61247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut off limbs</tr_>: generally, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mow down</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Δημήτερα</foreign> Epic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.377d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
